label: Greek Pillar FZB DaFT
author: Duncan Anderson
description:
This is an 8' pillar skin designed to cover the structural pillars interior to the effigy base. It requires:

8x 8' 2x4s
2x 16" 2x8s with 45deg bezel cuts
2x 24" 2x12s with 45deg bezel cuts
(possibly)
2x 4" 2x4s with 45deg bezel cuts for attaching the verticals (interior)
